parameters.content:
## Meta Ads Optimisation Agent

**Runs:** Daily at 9am UTC + on-demand webhook
**Accounts:** Flow States Retreats, Emma Maidment Business, Flow OS
**Output:** Telegram report to Tyson with per-account scored recommendations + AI analysis

**Token:** Long-lived system user token stored as n8n Header Auth credential
(id: bJDoAH6FBEUyRbJK). No expiry tracking required.

**To rotate the token:**
1. Generate new long-lived token in Meta Business Suite
2. Update the Header Auth credential value to "Bearer <new_token>"
3. No node edits required — credential is referenced by Fetch Ad Insights

parameters.responseBody: {"status": "triggered", "message": "Optimisation report is being generated and will be emailed shortly."}
